orderHint: Time sets the order within the day.
permBody: Notifications will nudge you on time, even when this tab is in the background.

settings.permDenied: System notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
settings.permDefault: Allow system notifications so reminders show even when the tab is in the background.
settings.permUnsupported: This device doesn't support system notifications.
settings.note: Reminders fire while SnugWeek is open in a tab or installed as an app. Reminders for a fully closed app are coming in a later update.
